nodes.name: next-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Next.js TypeScript environment type reference file that includes Next.js type declarations for the dashboard project.

nodes.name: next.config.js
nodes.summary: Next.js configuration file for the RisingWave dashboard, specifying rewrites for API proxying to a backend RisingWave meta server.

nodes.name: generate_proto.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that compiles protobuf definitions from the proto/ directory into TypeScript code for use in the RisingWave dashboard.

nodes.name: global.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS stylesheet for the RisingWave dashboard, applying base styles and Tailwind CSS resets.

nodes.name: devshell.nix
nodes.summary: Nix development shell configuration providing all required tools and environment variables for RisingWave development via nix-shell or nix develop.

nodes.name: flake.nix
nodes.summary: Nix flake definition for the RisingWave development environment, specifying inputs (nixpkgs, flake-utils) and outputs including the devShell.

nodes.name: overlays.nix
nodes.summary: Nix overlays file providing custom package overrides used by the RisingWave development flake.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Python CLI tool for running SQL benchmarks against RisingWave, supporting init and run subcommands that generate Python benchmark scripts from YAML configs and execute them.

nodes.name: create_benchmark_script
nodes.summary: Reads a YAML benchmark definition and generates an executable Python script that runs the defined SQL queries against a target database.

nodes.name: init_benchmark
nodes.summary: Initializes a new benchmark directory and creates a YAML template file for the given benchmark name.

nodes.name: run_benchmark
nodes.summary: Executes a named benchmark by generating its script, running it against a Postgres URL with the specified profile, and reporting results.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point using argparse to dispatch between init and run subcommands for the sql_bench tool.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the sql_bench tool covering background, overview, prerequisites, creating benchmarks, running benchmarks, debugging, and directory structure across 8 sections.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python package requirements file for the sql_bench tool listing its external dependencies.

nodes.name: aws-build.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds and pushes the RisingWave Docker image to AWS ECR for deployment.

nodes.name: risingwave-dev-dashboard.json
nodes.summary: Grafana dashboard JSON definition for the RisingWave developer dashboard, providing metrics panels for internal development monitoring.
nodes.languageNotes: Minified single-line JSON file representing a complete Grafana dashboard definition.

nodes.name: risingwave-user-dashboard.json
nodes.summary: Grafana dashboard JSON definition for the RisingWave user-facing dashboard, providing metrics panels for end-user monitoring of streaming jobs.
nodes.languageNotes: Minified single-line JSON file representing a complete Grafana dashboard definition.

nodes.name: risingwave.toml
nodes.summary: Minimal RisingWave runtime configuration for the Docker deployment, setting essential server parameters.

nodes.name: book.toml
nodes.summary: mdBook configuration for the RisingWave developer guide, specifying book metadata, table-of-contents preprocessor, HTML output, and link checker settings.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Entry point for the RisingWave developer guide mdBook, describing how to build the book, view the table of contents, and validate links.

nodes.name: intro.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for building and running RisingWave covering environment setup on macOS/Linux/nix, starting a dev cluster with risedev, compilation tips, and configuring components and system variables across 10 sections.

nodes.name: profiles.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for RisingWave build profiles, describing built-in profiles, custom profile creation, performance comparisons, and guidance on choosing a profile.

nodes.name: intro.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive connector development guide covering environment setup, user-managed mode, end-to-end tests, system command tips, and adding new connectors to the development framework across 6 sections.

nodes.name: source.md
nodes.summary: Documentation of the source connector architecture describing connectors, enumerators, ConnectorSource, and SourceExecutor components and how they work together.

nodes.name: intro.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive testing guide covering lint, unit/integration tests, planner tests, e2e tests, fuzzing tests (SqlSmith), DocSlt tests, deterministic simulation tests, and backward compatibility tests across 12 sections.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level docs overview providing a brief pointer to the RisingWave documentation resources.

nodes.name: .coverageignore
nodes.summary: Coverage ignore file for the e2e_test directory listing SQL test files and directories to exclude from coverage reporting.

nodes.name: backfill_order_control_recovery_progress.slt
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest end-to-end test verifying backfill order control with recovery, checking that streaming backfill progress is correctly tracked and recoverable.

nodes.name: backfill_order_control_recovery.slt
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest end-to-end test verifying that backfill with order control correctly recovers after a node failure or restart.
